summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Payroll Reporting module (Staff Reporting section). All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all features working correctly.

minor.issue: API accepts empty recipients list without validation error (returns 200 instead of 400/422)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/config - Get default config (200)
Backend: PUT /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/config - Update config with custom overtime thresholds (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/preview - Preview payroll data for current month (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/preview - Preview for different month (200)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/generate - Generate PDFs + Excel + CSV (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports - List generated reports (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports?year=2026 - Filter by year (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id}/download/global_pdf - Download PDF (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id}/download/excel - Download Excel (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id}/download/csv - Download CSV (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id}/download/invalid_type - Invalid type rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{fake_id}/download/global_pdf - Non-existent report (404)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id}/send - Send email MOCKED (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/email-logs - Get email logs (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id} - Get report detail with files (200)
Backend: Config endpoint requires authentication (401)
Backend: Generate endpoint requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Staff Reporting page loads correctly
Frontend: KPIs display (Collaborateurs, Heures, H.Sup 25%, H.Sup 50%, CP, Maladie)
Frontend: Generate Reports button works - shows success toast
Frontend: Configuration modal opens with all fields (emails, overtime threshold, auto-send)
Frontend: Send Email modal opens with MOCK warning displayed
Frontend: PDF/Excel/CSV download buttons work - files download successfully
Frontend: Month navigation (prev/next) works correctly
Frontend: Employee table displays with correct columns
Frontend: Hours by service chart displays
action_items: MINOR: Add validation to reject empty recipients list in send email endpoint
seed_data_creation: Used existing employee 'Jean Dupont' for testing. Created test payroll reports for March 2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payroll Reporting module fully tested. All APIs working correctly. Email sending is MOCKED (simulation mode). PDF generation uses reportlab, Excel uses openpyxl. Files are stored as base64 in MongoDB. Frontend StaffReporting.jsx component has all required data-testid attributes for testing.

mocked_apis_list: Email sending via POST /api/hotels/{id}/payroll-reports/reports/{report_id}/send - Returns success but emails are not actually sent

payroll_config.get_config: Returns default or saved config with overtime thresholds
payroll_config.update_config: Updates accountant emails, overtime thresholds (25%/50%), auto-send settings, email templates

payroll_preview.preview_data: Returns employee payroll data without generating files

report_generation.generate_reports: Creates individual PDFs, global PDF, Excel, and CSV files
report_generation.files_stored_base64: All files stored as base64 in MongoDB

email_sending.send_email: MOCKED - Simulates sending, logs to payroll_email_logs collection
email_sending.email_logs: Returns history of sent emails with status

frontend_ui.kpis: Displays 6 KPIs: Collaborateurs, Heures totales, H.Sup 25%, H.Sup 50%, CP, Maladie
frontend_ui.actions: Generate, PDF Global, Excel, CSV, Send Email, Configuration buttons
frontend_ui.employee_table: Shows employee details with H.Norm, H.Sup 25%, H.Sup 50%, CP, Maladie columns
frontend_ui.hours_chart: Bar chart showing hours by service/department
frontend_ui.config_modal: Configure accountant emails, overtime thresholds, auto-send, email templates
frontend_ui.send_modal: Send email with MOCK warning, recipients, subject, body, attachments preview
